reviews.review_description:
4 out of 5 *
Ultrawings is a fun flying retro style game full of hours of entertainment.
Easy to play, casual and has a Pilot wings nostalgia feel. The experience of flying feels great.The reason I'm giving it a 4 * review is due to the following,
The price of planes and unlocking islands is high and can be grueling "feels like progressing is very slow", no multi-player, occasionally for some reason holding of the stick or positioning of the stick stops or gets stuck "not caused from dirty headset sensors". After hours of playing I would still recommend this game or "perhaps Ultrawings 2" since I've heard good things about it and how some of these issues have already been addressed in ultrawings 2. Still fun as hell! Thanks devs!
This is as close as the  Dreamcast game Areowings as it gets. Many hours of fun, highly recommend if you are into flying.

I've had this since the Gear VR / Oculus Go and then rebought it because I missed it (before part 2 came out). I really got my air legs on this and keep coming back to its casual comfort even though I have MS Flight sim and X plane.
Good starting point in the series but the second game was more fun, had easier controls, and felt much easier to progress
Reminds me of Pilot Wings of the Nintendo 64 era. The graphics and gameplay are simplistic and perfect! Jump right in and really feel like you’re flying!

reviews.review_title: Progresses slow but it a  good game
reviews.review_description: I think that the progress should be quicker in the sequel like you purchase planes planes at each different Airport that you buy and you don't have to do like a thousand missions to get it and I also think that the altitude identifier should be better It is extremely hard to read the altitude monitor I use it when I go stunt flying a whole bunch. And how do i get to multiplayer

I just got this game because I want a flight sim and what I got was a hot steaming piece of garbage let me explain:
I bought this game you would think you would have full access? Nope all you have is a bad repetitive game that unrealistic the yolk slips away the challenges are hard and the same thing in order to progress you need to do those challenges I strongly don't recommend this game
So far so good! Can’t wait to unlock more aircraft.

reviews.review_title: Makes me wanna barf.... in a good way!!!
reviews.review_description: I have always wanted to learn to fly. This game gas given me and my daughter hours of high flying fun that feels SO REAL!!!

reviews.review_title: Good flight simulator with some issues
reviews.review_description: The flight sim part is good, mostly accurate and the game structure is fine if you like doing the challenges. Every now and then though, you find you can’t grab the throttle or the stick doesn’t respond, or it’s hard to turn on the fuel and you grab the flaps by mistake. These maybe limitations with Oculus Quest or the game itself. Having overrides by using the joysticks on the Oculus controllers may help. Otherwise a fun distraction!
Doesn’t work ! Command aren’t accurate at all!

Amazing game, but I might be a bit biased because I was a huge fan of pilot wings on N64 and this game reminds me of it. 
Being objective: graphics are basic but the gameplay is solid, anyone that enjoys flying will enjoy this game.

reviews.review_title: Almost fell out of my chair
reviews.review_description: As a private pilot I was Not expecting to be impressed, but this game is more fun than a barrel of drunk monkeys - and a perfect way to unwind just using free flight mode...

reviews.review_title: Great when you can get it to fly...
reviews.review_description: ...but I seem to be spending more time trying to turn the fuel switch than actually playing the game.  Please sort this out, I know I'm not the only one.

reviews.review_title: Great game in GearVR, but awful in Quest
reviews.review_description: I used to play it in a Gear VR. Simulator mode only, with a XBOX One S gamepad and it was great. Now in Quest the support for gamepad is broken. The game just freezes with a black screen. I have not option but playing it with the Oculus Touch controllers, but this is a crap. Especially throttle control is terrible. Precision flight control is impossible. I am very disappointed, and hope the devs fix the game soon.
Great game , played too much so need a break.

The gameplay is fun and pretty realistic but it’s super hard just to turn the engine on and take off. I just tried for 30 mins to “turn the engine fuel flow” on and my virtual finger just keeps going through the button. It’s super frustrating I can’t even start flying. I don’t know how to fix it

developer_response.body: Grab the fuel flow with the grip button and rotate like a key.

reviews.review_description: Not worth it
I'm s pilot and it seems fairly legit.

Do not let the Nintendo style graphics fool you.  The flight physics of this game are incredible.  I wish the devs would add DLC for more maps and planes (Helicopters too perhaps?!).  I'd purchase more content for this game in a heartbeat...
